subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! Thy letter was received. The priests are as beasts, and thus, in common parlance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه مرقوم ملحوظ افتاد دستوران ستورانند لهذا باصطلاح عوام
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @consolation and comfort
